headline: Man's 'I'm A Laughing Person' Is Actually Just Him Saying 'That's Funny' Without Ever Laughing
summary: 'That's funny,' Jake said. His face did not move. 'I'm laughing internally,' Jake explained.
fullBody: Jake McStoic claims he has a 'great sense of humor.' He has never laughed. 'That's humorous,' Jake said, stone-faced. 'I'm laughing on the inside.' His friends have started a 'Jake Laugh' bingo card. 'I think he's broken,' one said. Jake has started a comedy podcast. He reads jokes without inflection. 'It's avant-garde,' Jake said. Listeners disagree. The podcast has 2 reviews. Both say 'this isn't funny.' 'That's subjective,' Jake said.
